claim: A 2023 review found that fewer than 10 percent of smallholder farmers in SSA and South Asia use improved, climate-resilient seed varieties, with access constrained by seed-system weaknesses.

source.title: Seed systems and climate-resilient agriculture in LMICs

method: Reviewed seed-system analysis, adoption-rate studies, and barrier classification.
limitations: Adoption data varies by crop and region.
